note: The post-purple "safe SaaS" look — indigo just replaced the banned purple gradient. Source the accent from the product's actual job (what it removes friction from), not the category default.

Emerald/teal became fintech's reflex once navy felt dated; a serif display now signals "trust" by rote. Trust reads from visible compliance and precision, not a mint accent — try the brand's literal money/material story.

Navy + a transitional serif is the autopilot "bank" — every legacy institution and neobank lands here. Restraint and clarity carry the trust; let the differentiator be the rate/product clarity, not the navy.
Black + neon glow is crypto cosplay; skepticism is high and the cliche reads as scam-adjacent. Credibility cues (real numbers, plain language) differentiate more than the glow.
Coral-and-mint with fully rounded cards is the Shopify-template reflex. Let the product photography set the palette; the UI should recede so goods are the hero.
A thin high-contrast serif on cream is the default "luxury" costume; it signals luxury-of-the-template, not the house. Provenance and material specificity carry premium, not Cormorant.

Soft sky-blue + rounded everything is the reflex "we're gentle" health look — indistinguishable across clinics. Reassure with legible proof and warmth sourced from the actual care setting, not a pastel wash.
Lavender/peach blobs are the wellness-app reflex; they can read as infantilizing. Emotional safety comes from honest language and quiet type, not a soft-blob gradient.
Condensed all-caps + black/volt is the gym-poster reflex. Transformation proof and momentum sell; find energy in the specific discipline rather than the default volt.
Poppins + primary-color illustrations is the ed-tech reflex that reads juvenile. Show a credible learning path; let the subject matter, not a default cheerful blue, set the tone.
Mono-everywhere on near-black with a violet accent is the post-Linear devtool reflex. Real working code earns trust; reserve mono for code, and source the accent from the tool's domain.
Iridescent mesh + glowing orb is THE generative-AI reflex of 2024-2026; it screams "another AI wrapper." Demonstrate the capability concretely; let a real artifact, not a gradient blob, be the hero.
Dark HUD with red alerts and scanlines is fear-theatre cosplay. Concrete coverage and outcomes convey control better than a threat-grid backdrop.

Oversized Clash/Syne with tiny mono labels is the agency-template reflex — every studio site by 2026. The portfolio is the proof; the typographic shout should be specific to the work, not a default acid accent.
Big-italic-serif headline + ruled lines is the saturated "tasteful portfolio" look. Make the work unmissable and let personality show through the actual pieces, not a borrowed editorial frame.
A high-contrast serif over a dim food hero on cream is the restaurant-template reflex. Sell the specific atmosphere with real imagery; let the cuisine, not Playfair, set the palette.
Thin serif + sand/navy over a sunset hero is the boutique-hotel reflex. Evoke a specific place; let the architecture and light, not a sand palette default, carry premium.
Geometric sans + teal "trust" accent is the listings-portal reflex. Property imagery and fast search differentiate; source any accent from the locale, not a default teal.
Navy/burgundy with a transitional serif is the law-firm reflex — gravitas by template. Credibility and clarity outweigh flourish; let specifics of the practice show, not the default seal.
Coral + green with smiling stock photos is the charity-template reflex. Real stories and concrete impact connect; let the cause, not a default hopeful coral, set the palette.
Magenta/cyan neon on black is the esports-template reflex. The world and spectacle sell; pull the palette from the game's actual art direction, not a default neon duo.
Massive condensed type on black with grain is the artist-page reflex. Match the mood to the actual sound; let the release art, not a default hot-pink, lead.
Transitional serif + red masthead is the news-template reflex. Scannable hierarchy and reading comfort matter most; let the publication's voice, not a default red, differentiate.
Inter + blue links + left sidebar is the docs-template reflex (every Docusaurus/Mintlify site). Fast retrieval is the job; a distinctive but legible face and a sourced accent beat the default blue.
Inter on dark with a rainbow categorical palette is the dashboard reflex; rainbow charts hurt legibility. Source a restrained categorical scale from the data's meaning, not a default spectrum.
Blue + safety-orange over a route map is the logistics-template reflex. Reliability and visible status reassure; source the accent from the network, not a default orange.
Friendly sans + calm blue is the insurance-template reflex that reads interchangeable. Make complex coverage feel simple and honest; let the specific protection, not a default trust-blue, lead.

Public Sans + flag-blue is the gov-template default (USWDS-adjacent). Accessibility and findability are the job; the default is acceptable for trust but differentiate through task clarity, not decoration.
Sage + sand with airy serif is the spa-template reflex. Cultivate a specific calm; let the actual practice and place, not a default sage wash, set the palette.

Purple/cyan gradients with glass cards is the web3-template reflex amid hype fatigue. Clear utility and transparency counter it; source the palette from the protocol's purpose, not a default neon mesh.
Inter + navy + a logo wall is the enterprise-template reflex — safe and forgettable. Speak to ROI and proof; differentiate through the specific outcome, not a default corporate navy.
Geist + indigo + a single big CTA is the Y-Combinator-template reflex. Communicate one clear idea fast; let the actual product, not a default indigo, carry the spark.
Bold type + duotone cover art is the podcast-template reflex. Make the latest episode instantly playable; pull color from the show's actual identity, not a default duotone.
Red/mango rounded everything is the delivery-app reflex (every DoorDash clone). Crave-worthy imagery and speed sell; source warmth from the actual cuisines, not a default food-red.
Pink/coral gradient with rounded everything is the dating-app reflex. Optimism and visible safety differentiate; let the specific community, not a default pink, lead.
Inter + one blue accent is the productivity-app reflex (post-Linear/Notion). Show removed friction; source the accent from the workflow's domain, not a default focus-blue.
Inter + clean blue + an inbox screenshot is the email-client reflex. Speed and privacy are the pitch; differentiate through the specific habit it improves, not a default blue.
Inter + a pipeline screenshot + corporate blue is the CRM-template reflex. Prove pipeline clarity and fit; source any accent from the sales motion, not a default blue.
Friendly sans + teal with people photos is the HR-template reflex. Balance warmth and compliance rigor; let the actual culture, not a default teal, set the tone.
Green "trust" + dual-sided hero is the marketplace-template reflex. Serve both sides and foreground real trust mechanisms; source color from the goods traded, not a default green.
Fraunces + blush/sage unboxing shots is the subscription-box reflex. Sell anticipation and clear recurring value; let the actual curation, not a default blush, lead.
Cinematic dark + metallic silver is the auto-template reflex. Let the vehicle command the screen; source any accent from the model's actual finish, not a default silver.
